use_cases: Triggering actions or form submissions in web applications
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces
Destructive action confirmations with destructive variant
Secondary actions with outline or ghost variants
ai_summary: A foundational button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Uses the compound component pattern with forwardRef for proper React integration. Designed as an atomic UI primitive suitable for any design system or framework.
